text:
:wrench: *CI Configuration*:
```yaml
name: PulseDesk CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8.0
        env:
          MYSQL_DATABASE: pulsedesk_test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: shivammathur/setup-php@v2
        with: { php-version: '8.3' }
      - run: composer install --no-interaction
      - run: php artisan test
```

elements.text:
yaml
name: PulseDesk CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8.0
        env:
          MYSQL_DATABASE: pulsedesk_test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: shivammathur/setup-php@v2
        with: { php-version: '8.3' }
      - run: composer install --no-interaction
      - run: php artisan test
